step_rationale: Endothelial stress gene upregulated in erosion-prone lesions; marks endothelial activation.
mechanism: OSGIN1 upregulation marks endothelial cell dysfunction and activation in plaque erosion-prone sites.

references.title: A Nrf2-OSGIN1&2-HSP70 axis mediates cigarette smoke-induced endothelial detachment: implications for plaque erosion.
